title: Amtech J1870 Dual Cup Suction Lifter with 60kg Capacity, Ideal for Lifting Glass Sheets and Mirrors, Clear
features: POWERFUL SUCTION: This dual suction cup lifter is ideal for lifting objects up to 60kg in weight
EASY TO USE: With a durable plastic body and two 115mm diameter rubber suction cups, it is easy to use – simply tighten and clip the two handles together to create a powerful suction
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
WIDE APPLICATION: Useful for a range of repair, assembly, and maintenance jobs
description: From the manufacturer Amtech J1870 Heavy Duty Dual Suction Cup Lifter Capacity : The maximum lifting capacity of this suction cup is up to 60kg, so an ideal product for carrying heavy items including mirrors, board, and sheets of glass. Multi-Use : The Amtech Heavy Duty Suction Cup is an ideal product for metalworkers to handle sheet fabrications. It is also helpful whilst handling various appliances and cabinets. Strong Construction : The heavy-duty dual suction cup has a durable plastic body with thick rubber cups to produce greater suction. This is an ideal glass lifting suction cup. Dual Mechanism : The suction cup comes with dual cups mechanism that offers greater suction. The product is very easy to use. You just simply need to tighten the two clips.
